scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/shared && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/indexer && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/rpc-gateway && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/web && npm run lint:factory
scripts.lint:factory: cargo fmt --check -p factory && cargo clippy -p factory --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/shared && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/indexer && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/rpc-gateway && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/shared && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/indexer && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/rpc-gateway && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/web
